attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SCHEDULE_ID, ADJUSTMENT_ID, CREDIT_SUMMARY_ID, DEBIT_SUMMARY_ID, ADJUSTMENT_CURRENCY_CODE, ASSOCIATION_TYPE, ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE, ORG_ID, GL_DATE, SCHEDULE_LINE_AMT, SCHEDULE_LINE_ACCTD_AMT, SCHEDULE_LINE_NO, CATCHUP_FLAG, DOWNSTREAM_UPDATED_FLAG, GL_INTERFACED_FLAG, ERROR_FLAG, PROCESSING_FLAG, DEBIT_SEGMENT1, DEBIT_SEGMENT2, DEBIT_SEGMENT3, DEBIT_SEGMENT4, DEBIT_SEGMENT5, DEBIT_SEGMENT6, CREDIT_SEGMENT1, CREDIT_SEGMENT2, CREDIT_SEGMENT3, CREDIT_SEGMENT4, CREDIT_SEGMENT5, CREDIT_SEGMENT6, DEBIT_CCID, CREDIT_CCID, SOURCE_KEY1, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9, ATTRIBUTE10, ATTRIBUTE11, ATTRIBUTE12, ATTRIBUTE13, ATTRIBUTE14, ATTRIBUTE15, ATTRIBUTE16, ATTRIBUTE17, ATTRIBUTE18, ATTRIBUTE19, ATTRIBUTE20, SUMMARY_ELIGIBLE_FLAG, STANDARD_GL_POSTED_FLAG, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, LAST_UPDATED_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, SOURCE_DML_TYPE, SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$NRTACCUMDB.BV_XXCFI_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHED
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BV_XXCFI_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHED.SCHEDULE_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
